creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Guido Falsi from comment #2)
> Committed, with minor changes.

Thanks for committing.

> It has been documented in thee porter's handbook:
> 
> https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/plist-
> cleaning.html

Yes, after I submitted this PR :) (I had searched pkg(8) and the porters handbook for the reasoning behind the @dirrm{try,} cleanups, but couldn't find anything - at least now I know why)
http://svnweb.freebsd.org/doc/head/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/porters-handbook/plist/chapter.xml?r1=45657&r2=45707

Thanks again.
